title: Serenity: Dawn
description: A Medieval inspired modpack centered around Epic Knights, Book of Dragons, Farmer's Delight, and the Macaw's series, it also includes some worldgen overhaul mods such as Regions Unexplored and Tectonic.
body: Build and decorate your village with Macaw's mods and Handcrafted. Raise armies of Villager Recruits to defend it. Find and tame dragons to ride and explore the world. Perhaps create a faction and participate in pitched battles with your friends. Would you rather build a realm or be a simple farmer tending your crops with Farmer's Delight? This modpack provides many new biomes and mobs to discover. Adventure awaits!
